name: Lady Finger Icebox Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Beat the yolks separately, then add them to the melted chocolate that has cooled slightly.
3. Add this mixture to the butter-sugar combination.
4. Beat the egg whites until they hold soft peaks, then fold them gently into the chocolate mixture.
5. Arrange lady fingers along the bottom and sides of a trifle bowl.
6. Alternate layers of lady fingers with the chocolate mixture.
7. Top with whipped cream or cool whip.
8. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving to allow flavors to meld.
9. The cake can be stored in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
